examples:
Command Example
#
!bhe-path-exist from_principal="12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc" to_principal="87654321-4321-4321-4321-cba987654321"
Human Readable Output
#
From Principal
To Principal
Status

!bhe-path-exist from_principal="12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc" to_principal="87654321-4321-4321-4321-cba987654321"

#
From Principal
To Principal
Status
Message
Path Exists

outputs.description: The start node (from principal) used in the path check. SpecterOpsBHE.Path.ToPrincipal The end node (to principal) used in the path check.
outputs.name: SpecterOpsBHE.Path.FromPrincipal

outputs.description: The status of the path check (success or error). SpecterOpsBHE.Path.Message The message describing the result of the path check.
outputs.name: SpecterOpsBHE.Path.Status

outputs.description: Whether a path exists between the nodes (True or False).
outputs.name: SpecterOpsBHE.Path.Data
